name: web_search
description: Search the internet via DuckDuckGo. Returns titles, snippets, and URLs.
description_for_agent: Search the internet using DuckDuckGo. Returns search results with titles, URLs, and snippets. Parameters: query (string, required — search query), limit (integer, optional, default 10 — max results), region (string, optional — region code like 'us-en', 'ru-ru'). Use this when you need to find information, research a topic, or discover URLs.
